Get pet support

Support for pets and their people

  • Find tailored support for a pet

    Whether you're facing a crisis situation, working with a pet guardian who needs support, seeking assistance to keep your pet, exploring rehoming pathways or have found a stray we're here to provide tailored support

    A wide range of immediately accessible articles to help you and your pet

    Rehoming support for your clients

  • Home2Home for rescue organisations

    A positive alternative to pet surrender

RSPCA Illawarra Shelter

Active in: NSW

Facebook
@RSPCANSW
http://www.rspcansw.org.au
RSPCA Illawarra Shelter
02 4271 3410

About RSPCA Illawarra Shelter

Our six shelters throughout NSW care for more than 35,000 injured, neglected, sick, surrendered and unwanted animals each year. Shelters are a place where people can seek advice on their pet’s health and temperament. They are also a haven for animals that have been abandoned, lost, or have been victims of cruelty or neglect.

All RSPCA NSW shelters promote, support and facilitate animal adoptions.

Rehoming Organisation Number: R251000223

Click to expand...

© PetRescue Ltd 2004 - 2026 Terms of Use | Privacy Policy | Financial Services Guide

PetRescue acknowledges Traditional Owners of Country throughout Australia and recognises the continuing connection to lands, waters and communities. We pay our respect to Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander cultures; and to Elders past, present and emerging.

1 3 Months Free Offer

This Offer is available for purchases from 00:00AM AEDT on 16/04/2026 to 23:59PM AEST on 28/06/2026. Where the Offer is available This Offer is available when you purchase a new Everyday Pet Insurance policy on the Everyday Insurance website or through calling the Customer Hub. Who is Eligible This Offer applies to customers who enter or provide the promo code PET3MO during the Offer period when purchasing a policy. The discount cannot be applied after purchase. How it works To enjoy your first 3 months of free cover, you must enter the promo code PET3MO when buying the policy online or provide the promo code to the Customer Hub when buying the policy over the phone. Only 1 promo code may be used at the time of purchase. This offer entitles you to 3 months free in your first policy year of your policy cover, provided the policy remains in force and with all premiums paid in full. If you choose to pay annually, you will have the 3 months free, a discount equivalent to 3 months of premium applied to your annual premium at the time of purchase. If you choose to pay by monthly or fortnightly instalment, you will not be charged an instalment for the first 3 months of your first policy period. Your payments will start from the fourth month of your policy period. The discounted premium will be shown on your Certificate of Insurance, which you'll receive after your policy is accepted. You will no longer receive this offer if your policy is cancelled, if you change your level of cover, and or your policy number changes. The discount will also no longer be allocated if your Everyday Rewards account is cancelled, terminated, or suspended. What is not included This offer excludes: Everyday Car, Home, Landlord, Travel Insurance products and Everyday Roadside Assist. Additional Important Information Enjoyment of this offer is subject to the Everyday Insurance Terms and Conditions. Please consider the Everyday Pet Insurance Product Disclosure Statement, Financial Services Guide and Target Market Determination found here available to determine if the products are right for you. Woolworths reserves the right to vary, withdraw or extend this offer at any time. Woolworths will provide reasonable notice of any adverse changes.

° This offer is only available for policyholders who have a registered Everyday Rewards Card linked to their eligible active Everyday Insurance policy. This offer is limited to one in-store Woolworths Supermarket transaction up to $500, with a maximum saving of $50 per Everyday Rewards Card, per month, regardless of the number of Woolworths services you use. For full T&Cs click here.

† Offer available to new Everyday Pet Insurance policyholders, and is limited to 1 membership per eligible policy. The free membership offer (valued at $199p.a) is from the date of your policy commencement, provided your Everyday Pet Insurance policy remains active. You are not eligible to redeem the free membership subscription for cash or credit. VetAssist is a separate subscription based service to the Everyday Pet Insurance product, and is provided independently by Everyday Insurance third party service provider, VetChat Services Pty Ltd (VetChat). Click here for full VetAssist Service terms and conditions. Everyday Insurance reserves the right to vary or remove this offer at any time and will provide reasonable notice of any such changes.

Everyday Pet Insurance policies entered into for the first time prior to 17 July 2023 and subsequent renewals of those policies are issued by The Hollard Insurance Company Pty Ltd ABN 78 090 584 473, AFSL 241436 (Hollard), arranged and administered by PetSure (Australia) Pty Ltd ABN 95 075 949 923, AFSL 420183 (PetSure) and promoted and distributed by Hollard’s Authorised Representative (AR) Woolworths Group Limited ABN 88 000 014 675, AR 245476 (Woolworths). Everyday Pet Insurance policies entered into for the first time on or after 17 July 2023 and subsequent renewals of those policies are issued by PetSure and promoted and distributed by PetSure’s ARs, Woolworths Group Limited ABN 88 000 014 675, AR 245476 (Woolworths), and PetRescue Ltd ABN 35 123 057 536, AR 1307442. Any advice provided is general only and does not take into account your individual objectives, financial situation or needs. Please consider the Product Disclosure Statement (PDS) to ensure this product meets your needs before purchasing, or choosing to continue with the product. PDS and Target Market Determination available at insurance.everyday.com.au/pet-insurance.
